# Vivotek RTSP paths.
/live.sdp	Vivotek live
/live1.sdp	Vivotek live1
/live2.sdp	Vivotek live2
/live3.sdp	Vivotek live3
/live_h264.sdp	Vivotek live H.264
/live_mpeg4.sdp	Vivotek live MPEG-4
/play1.sdp	Vivotek play1
/play2.sdp	Vivotek play2
/rtpvideo1.sdp	Vivotek RTP video 1
/cgi-bin/viewer/video.jpg?resolution=640x480	Vivotek viewer snapshot
